## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`feature/` or `fix/`)
- [ ] Code follows PSR-12 and TYPO3 CGL
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No hardcoded strings (use extension settings)
- [ ] `declare(strict_types=1)` present in all new PHP files
